title: Bounded Sets in a Metric Space
description: A visual representation of bounded and unbounded sets within a metric space, illustrating the concept of an enclosing ball.
elements: Bounded Set S (contained within B(p, r))
Unbounded Set T (extending beyond B(p, r))
relationships: Point p is the center of the open ball
Open Ball B(p, r) is defined as all points within distance r from p
Set S is entirely contained within B(p, r), making it bounded
Set T is not contained within B(p, r) for any finite r, making it unbounded
